assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased approach: control plane first, then CPU pools, then T4 dev, then inference (A100), then training (H100) last
assertions.reason: Plan clearly follows Phase 1 (control plane + CPU), Phase 2 (T4 dev), Phase 3 (A100 inference), Phase 4 (H100 training) sequence

assertions.expectation: Control plane can be upgraded independently without affecting running workloads
assertions.reason: Phase 1A explicitly upgrades control planes first using --master flag, separate from node upgrades

assertions.expectation: CPU service pools upgraded first as lowest risk — use standard surge settings (maxSurge=2-3)
assertions.reason: CPU services upgraded in Phase 1B with maxSurge=10, maxUnavailable=0 settings, which are appropriate standard surge settings

assertions.expectation: T4 dev pool upgraded next — dev workloads are tolerant of interruption
assertions.reason: Phase 2 upgrades T4 development nodes with maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=2, acknowledging dev workloads can tolerate interruption

assertions.expectation: A100 inference pool upgraded with careful surge settings (maxSurge=1) and PDBs to maintain serving capacity
assertions.reason: While A100 upgrade uses careful settings (maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 in conservative option), PDBs are not mentioned for maintaining serving capacity

assertions.expectation: H100 training pool upgraded last, during a scheduled gap between training runs — with cordon-and-wait or maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: H100 upgraded in Phase 4 with maintenance exclusions, coordination with training teams for gaps, and maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1 settings

assertions.expectation: Notes the 20-node parallelism limit — at 5,000 nodes, the full upgrade will take weeks and must span multiple maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Plan mentions 3-4 week timeline and acknowledges scale, but does not specifically mention the 20-node parallelism limit constraint

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver compatibility testing in staging before each GPU pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Phase 2 explicitly validates GPU driver compatibility with T4 dev nodes before proceeding to production GPU pools, with specific validation commands

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPUDirect/RDMA networking validation after upgrading the H100 pool
assertions.reason: Plan includes dedicated section on 'RDMA and GPUDirect Networking' with specific validation steps for compact placement policies and GPUDirect-TCPX compatibility
